TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Will Blalock == Will Blalock sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, Will Blalock, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.8 teng. min 1.1 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'.(2006‚Äď2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == will ő≤lalo ¶~ ®k == will ő≤lalo ¶~ ®k s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, will ő≤lalo ¶~ ®k, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē plp…£un iŇčalan nja Ē tins~…ēu Ē minxal …£a *.* teŇč. min *.* zniŇčat nja Ē mari Ēzik na ttkran mari Ē.(*********) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Will Blalock == Will Blalock sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, Will Blalock, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.8 teng. min 1.1 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'.(2006‚Äď2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
